subject: Your mentor profile is in review
html:
Most reviews complete within a day or two
In review
Thanks {{first_name}} — your profile has been submitted for review. Most reviews complete within a day or two, and we'll email you the moment it's done.
Haven't heard from us in two weeks? Write to hello@openmentor.io — something may have gone astray.
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
